description_long: This doll features a mechanical, animatronic structure with exposed endoskeleton components and a partially attached head. The head is white with pink accents, large round eyes, and a pronounced snout, resembling a stylized animal, possibly a fox or dog. The limbs are segmented and jointed, with visible wiring and mechanical parts, and the hands and feet are mismatched, with one hand and one foot covered in white and pink casing while the others remain exposed. The torso is composed of black mechanical segments, and the overall appearance is disjointed, as if the doll is in a state of partial assembly or disrepair. The color palette is dominated by black, white, and pink, with metallic and plastic textures evident throughout. The doll's design is reminiscent of animatronic characters from entertainment venues or themed attractions.
description: A partially assembled animatronic doll with a white and pink animal-like head, exposed mechanical limbs, and mismatched hands and feet. The design features visible wiring and segmented joints, giving it a disjointed, robotic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, pink snout, and both arms extended, with one hand and one foot covered in white and pink casing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the protruding snout, and the mechanical structure of the limbs and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, exposed wiring, and the segmented mechanical spine and limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the head, the pink ear, and the mechanical details of the right arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is composed of exposed mechanical parts and partial casing, with white and pink plastic elements on the head, one hand, and one foot.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, one leg straight and the other slightly bent, and the head slightly detached and tilted.
attribute_facial_expression: The face has a neutral expression with wide, round eyes and a slightly open mouth, giving a blank or mechanical look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and covered in white and pink plastic casing.
